brief_headline: Ramp is doubling down on GTM + growth engineering — internal AI agents already run lead-gen and sales ops
why_now: Ramp is actively hiring across Growth Platform, GTM Platform Frontend, Product Growth, and an 'Agentic Operator, Growth Marketing' role, signaling investment in the engineering systems behind their go-to-market motion. Their careers page openly highlights internally-built agents that 'run their own lead-gen,' 'power our entire GTM team,' and a 'GTM brain used in every sales call' — meaning GTM engineering is a first-class discipline there, not a side project.
subject: before the Ontario SDR reqs close
body:
Two SDR reqs open in Ontario plus a Senior Data Scientist, Growth. Before that headcount lands, other GTM-platform teams are wiring account signals directly into rep workflows so new hires ramp on pre-qualified pipeline instead of raw lists.

Worth 20 minutes to compare notes on how Ramp's routing it? https://cal.com/abhip

— Abhinav, SignalForge

brief_headline: Notion is scaling GTM globally with Forward Deployed Engineers and multi-region SDR hiring
why_now: Notion has at least 12 active GTM roles open on Ashby, including three Forward Deployed Engineer, GTM roles across US, DACH, and France, signaling a push to embed engineers directly with revenue teams. They're also hiring a Global Head of GTM Recruiting and SDRs in Japan and Korea, indicating aggressive international GTM buildout alongside their AI workspace and Agents launch.
subject: GTM backbone for the Agents launch
body:
Enterprise PMM and Revenue Enablement PM EMEA both open right as Notion Agents ships. That's a GTM backbone being assembled under launch pressure, and enablement usually lags product by a quarter when reqs open this late.

I put together a one-pager on how three AI-native companies sequenced enablement around agent launches. Want me to send it over?

brief_headline: Anthropic is scaling a global GTM machine — EMEA/DACH ops, SDR managers, and regional Finance & Strategy all open at once
why_now: Anthropic has 12+ concurrent GTM-adjacent roles open on Greenhouse, including GTM Strategy & Ops for EMEA and DACH, Sales Development Managers for EMEA and Enterprise, and Finance & Strategy GTM leads for India and Korea. The simultaneous build-out of regional GTM ops, SDR management, and revenue finance systems (Finance Systems Engineer, Revenue; Compute Cost of Revenue Accountant) signals an enterprise go-to-market scale-up, not a point hire. Commercial Counsel, GTM is also open, pointing to contract volume growth alongside headcount.
subject: Finance Systems Engineer + Compute COGS
body:
Finance Systems Engineer, Revenue and Compute Cost of Revenue Accountant open at the same time tells me you're rebuilding revenue plumbing alongside the GTM scale-up, not patching it.

I put together a short memo on how two other frontier-model GTM orgs sequenced this (what they built in-house vs. bought). Want me to send it over?
